svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="claude"> <diagram id="roadmap" name="metanetsoft.com Roadmap"> <mxGraphModel dx="-634" dy="-416" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="1720" background="#0f1420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;" value="metanetsoft.com — React SSR Yeniden Yazım + Özellik Yol Haritası
(foxapplicant stack: TanStack Start · Vite SSR React 19 · TanStack Router · Tailwind v4 · Radix/CVA)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="820" x="140" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p0" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#374151;strokeColor=#6b7280;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P0 — Hazırlık & Güvenlik
• git 'rewrite' branch aç, mevcut canlı siteyi dondur/yedek
• foxapplicant stack'ini referans olarak incele
• SEO API key'lerini al (⛔ şu an bende yok)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#1f3b57;strokeColor=#3b82f6;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P1 — Scaffold (foxapplicant stack)
• TanStack Start (Vite SSR React 19) + TanStack Router (file-based)
• Tailwind v4 + Radix + CVA + lucide-react
• Node/nodemailer mail backend (Convex GEREKMEZ — pazarlama sitesi)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#1f3b57;strokeColor=#3b82f6;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P2 — 30-dilli i18n motorunu taşı
• mevcut i18n motorunu React context/hook olarak sar (yeniden yazma)
• SSR locale tespiti koru (cookie/header/geo) + hydrate
• <html lang/dir> RTL + hreflang temeli" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#1f3b57;strokeColor=#3b82f6;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P3 — Sayfaları React'e kur
• Hero + bölümler + footer — içerik/tasarım birebir korunur
• SSR render + client hydrate doğrula" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="520" x="290" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#3730a3;strokeColor=#818cf8;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P4 — UI & kopya değişiklikleri (30 dil translate)
• üstteki 'Randevu' butonunu kaldır → aşağı taşı
• 'PROTOKOLÜ BAŞLAT' → 'Mesaj Gönder'
• altına net 'Meeting Ayarla' (toplantı iste) butonu" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="696" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#3730a3;strokeColor=#818cf8;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P5 — Yeni 'Bize CV Gönder' bölümü (frame)
• CV upload (pdf/doc) + açıklama 'havuzda ileriki işler için işlenir'
• Gönder → server fn → nodemailer → user@metanetsoft.com (info@'dan)
• Windmill cv_pipeline cron zaten işliyor (aynı adresten çok mail OK)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="846" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#3730a3;strokeColor=#818cf8;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P6 — KVKK/GDPR açık rıza modal
• gönderimden önce scroll'lu uzun onay metni, 30 dil, responsive
• açık rıza + veri işleme + AI ile işlenme + yasal kullanım hakkı
• onay verilmeden CV gönderilmez" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="996" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#166534;strokeColor=#22c55e;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P7 — SEO revizyonu (mevcut SSR üstünde — React değil çözüyor)
• meta/OG/Twitter, JSON-LD (Organization/WebSite), canonical, hreflang×30
• sitemap.xml + robots.txt, performans/Lighthouse, font/görsel opt
• (SEO API key'leri → audit + Search Console)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="1146" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#166534;strokeColor=#22c55e;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P8 — Windmill cron (cv_outreach_mailer)
• GitHub'dan bulunan kişilere giden mail — metanetsoft temalı yap/doğrula
• metni değiştir: 'user@'a mail at' YERİNE
 'metanetsoft.com'a gir, CV'ni havuza yükle (ileriki pozisyonlar)'" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="520" x="290" y="1296" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=12;spacingTop=8;fillColor=#9a3412;strokeColor=#fb923c;fontColor=#f3f4f6;fontSize=12;" value="P9 — Deploy & Doğrulama
• Dockerfile/Nixpacks + Dokploy (foxapplicant deseni)
• SSR + i18n + form + CV upload + SEO smoke test → canlıya al" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="520" x="290" y="1446" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="blocker" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;fillColor=#7f1d1d;strokeColor=#f87171;fontColor=#fee2e2;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="⛔ BLOCKER — SEO API key'leri
Yapıştırdığın key'ler bana ULAŞMADI ('[Pasted text]').
Tekrar paylaş ya da Windmill/dosya değişkenini söyle.
P7 audit'i buna bağlı; kalan her şey key'siz ilerler." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="230" x="850" y="1146" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dep" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=10;spacingTop=6;fillColor=#1f2937;strokeColor=#9ca3af;fontColor=#e5e7eb;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" value="🔗 Bağımlılık
P8 cron metni P5 (CV yükleme sayfası) canlı olduktan sonra oraya yönlendirir." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="230" x="850" y="1310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e01" edge="1" parent="1" source="p0" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#9ca3af;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="p1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#9ca3af;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=block;endFill=1;" target="p2"> <mxGeometry div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 818px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
metanetsoft.com — React SSR Yeniden Yazım + Özellik Yol Haritası
(foxapplicant stack: TanStack Start · Vite SSR React 19 · TanStack Router · Tailwind v4 · Radix/CVA)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 101px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P0 — Hazırlık & Güvenlik
• git 'rewrite' branch aç, mevcut canlı siteyi dondur/yedek
• foxapplicant stack'ini referans olarak incele
• SEO API key'lerini al (⛔ şu an bende yok)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(31, 59, 87), rgb(169, 193, 217)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 251px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P1 — Scaffold (foxapplicant stack)
• TanStack Start (Vite SSR React 19) + TanStack Router (file-based)
• Tailwind v4 + Radix + CVA + lucide-react
• Node/nodemailer mail backend (Convex GEREKMEZ — pazarlama sitesi)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(31, 59, 87), rgb(169, 193, 217)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 401px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P2 — 30-dilli i18n motorunu taşı
• mevcut i18n motorunu React context/hook olarak sar (yeniden yazma)
• SSR locale tespiti koru (cookie/header/geo) + hydrate
• RTL + hreflang temeli

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(31, 59, 87), rgb(169, 193, 217)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 551px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P3 — Sayfaları React'e kur
• Hero + bölümler + footer — içerik/tasarım birebir korunur
• SSR render + client hydrate doğrula

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 687px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P4 — UI & kopya değişiklikleri (30 dil translate)
• üstteki 'Randevu' butonunu kaldır → aşağı taşı
• 'PROTOKOLÜ BAŞLAT' → 'Mesaj Gönder'
• altına net 'Meeting Ayarla' (toplantı iste) butonu

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 837px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P5 — Yeni 'Bize CV Gönder' bölümü (frame)
• CV upload (pdf/doc) + açıklama 'havuzda ileriki işler için işlenir'
• Gönder → server fn → nodemailer → user@metanetsoft.com (info@'dan)
• Windmill cv_pipeline cron zaten işliyor (aynı adresten çok mail OK)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 987px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P6 — KVKK/GDPR açık rıza modal
• gönderimden önce scroll'lu uzun onay metni, 30 dil, responsive
• açık rıza + veri işleme + AI ile işlenme + yasal kullanım hakkı
• onay verilmeden CV gönderilmez

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(22, 101, 52), rgb(117, 185, 143)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(34, 197, 94), rgb(0, 140, 52));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1137px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P7 — SEO revizyonu (mevcut SSR üstünde — React değil çözüyor)
• meta/OG/Twitter, JSON-LD (Organization/WebSite), canonical, hreflang×30
• sitemap.xml + robots.txt, performans/Lighthouse, font/görsel opt
• (SEO API key'leri → audit + Search Console)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(22, 101, 52), rgb(117, 185, 143)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(34, 197, 94), rgb(0, 140, 52));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1287px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P8 — Windmill cron (cv_outreach_mailer)
• GitHub'dan bulunan kişilere giden mail — metanetsoft temalı yap/doğrula
• metni değiştir: 'user@'a mail at' YERİNE
'metanetsoft.com'a gir, CV'ni havuza yükle (ileriki pozisyonlar)'

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(154, 52, 18), rgb(246, 159, 129)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(251, 146, 60), rgb(175, 84, 10));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 506px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1437px; margin-left: 164px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #f3f4f6;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#f3f4f6, #1a1b1c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
P9 — Deploy & Doğrulama
• Dockerfile/Nixpacks + Dokploy (foxapplicant deseni)
• SSR + i18n + form + CV upload + SEO smoke test → canlıya al

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(127, 29, 29), rgb(255, 176, 176)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(248, 113, 113), rgb(207, 91, 91));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1135px; margin-left: 722px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #fee2e2;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#fee2e2, #392121); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
⛔ BLOCKER — SEO API key'leri
Yapıştırdığın key'ler bana ULAŞMADI ('[Pasted text]').
Tekrar paylaş ya da Windmill/dosya değişkenini söyle.
P7 audit'i buna bağlı; kalan her şey key'siz ilerler.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(31, 41, 55), rgb(196, 204, 216)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(156, 163, 175), rgb(92, 98, 108));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1299px; margin-left: 722px;

div.div:
🔗 Bağımlılık
P8 cron metni P5 (CV yükleme sayfası) canlı olduktan sonra oraya yönlendirir.
